page_metadata.biotools__summary: Web server for generating 3D protein structures using input sequence data, NOE-based distance restraints or NMR chemical shifts. Output is a set of PDB coordinates for the input protein.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Web server for generating 3D protein structures using input sequence data, NOE-based distance restraints or NMR chemical shifts. Output is a set of PDB coordinates for the input protein.
